channel.title: a part of MµLearning
channel.description: Last 10 notes on a part of MµLearning

item.title: L5-Hooks
item.description: L5 , Hooks Where you are: You have a fully configured project.

item.title: Summary
item.description: to internalise Claude Code — Progressive Guide Index A level-by-level guide from first session to autonomous multi-agent workflows.

item.title: L8-MultiAgent-Headless-Power
item.description: L8 , Headless, Scheduling and Power Patterns Where you are: Your single-session toolkit is complete — context, permissions, hooks, MCP, skills, agents.

item.title: L6-MCP-Servers-and-Plugins
item.description: L6 , MCP Servers, Plugins & LSP Where you are: Claude can manage your files, run your build, and enforce your architecture rules.

item.title: L7-Skills-Agents-Commands
item.description: L7 , Skills, Agents & Custom Commands Where you are: Your project is configured — context, permissions, hooks, MCP.

item.title: Appendix 2... Settings Examples
item.description: Appendix 2 , Settings Examples Annotated reference for every configurable key across the three settings.json files.

item.title: Appendix 1... ignore files
item.description: Appendix 1 — Ignore Files How Claude Code decides which files exist, which it reads, and what you can do about it.

item.title: L3-Permissions-Settings
item.description: L3 , Permissions & settings.json Where you are: Sessions work, CLAUDE.md is set up, but Claude interrupts constantly for permission.

item.title: L4-Scoping
item.description: L4 , Scoping: Project vs Global Where you are: You have a working project configuration — CLAUDE.md, settings.json, and the .claude/ directory.

item.title: L2-Context-CLAUDE-md
item.description: L2 , Context & CLAUDE.md Where you are: You can run sessions.
